info.name: POS Backend API (Complete)
info.description:
Complete Postman collection for this Laravel backend. Generated from `scripts/generate_postman_collection.php` (mirrors `routes/api.php` and `GET /up`).

**Regenerate:** `php scripts/generate_postman_collection.php > POS_Backend_Complete_API_v2.postman_collection.json`

**Find routes fast:**
- **Device groups (terminals):** folder `4b. Device groups` — paths `device-groups`, `device-groups/report`.
- **Deposits:** under `13. Sales` → subfolder `Deposits` — `GET sales/by-reference/...`, `POST sales/.../complete-deposit`. Deposit **stock mode** settings: `2c. Business settings` → `settings/business` (`deposit_stock_mode`).
- **Shifts ↔ group:** `14. Sales shifts` — `POST shifts/backfill-groups` links shift `group_id` to device group (not the same folder as device-groups CRUD).

**Setup:**
1. `base_url` = http://127.0.0.1:8000/api — use paths without a second `/api` prefix.
2. `app_root` = http://127.0.0.1:8000 — for `/up` only.
3. Register or Login sets `auth_token`.
4. Use `X-Business-Id: {{business_id}}` on business-scoped routes.
5. Collection uses Bearer auth; public endpoints override with noauth.

item.name: 0. System
item.description: Laravel framework route (not under `/api`).

request.description:
Laravel default health endpoint (`bootstrap/app.php` → `health: '/up'`). Returns 200 when the application can boot. No authentication.

Use collection variable `app_root` (not `base_url`).

item.name: 1. Authentication
item.description: Public and protected auth endpoints. Register and Login store the token in collection variable `auth_token`.

request.description:
Returns the currently authenticated user (includes profile_image_url). Requires valid Bearer token.

**Response:** id, name, email, profile_image, profile_image_url.

Update current user profile.

**Fields:**
- name: optional | string | max:255
- profile_image: optional | file | image | max:2048

Returns updated user.

**Public.** Create a new user account.

**Fields:**
- name: required | string | max:255
- email: required | string | email | max:255 | unique:users
- password: required | string | min:8 | confirmed
- password_confirmation: required | string
- profile_image: optional | file | image | max:2048

Returns user + token. Test script saves token.

exec: if (pm.response.code === 201) { var j = pm.response.json(); if (j.token) pm.collectionVariables.set('auth_token', j.token); }

request.description:
**Public.** Login with email and password.

**Fields:**
- email: required | string | email
- password: required | string

Returns user + token. Test script saves token.

exec: if (pm.response.code === 200) { var j = pm.response.json(); if (j.token) pm.collectionVariables.set('auth_token', j.token); }

request.description:
**Public.** Fast login with 6-digit PIN.

**Fields:**
- pin_code: required | string | size:6

User must have PIN set and 'use-pin-login' permission.

Set or update a user's PIN.

**Fields:**
- user_id: required | integer | exists:users,id
- pin_code: required | string | size:6
- password: required_if setting own PIN | string

Requires manage-pin-codes for other users.

Remove PIN for a user.

**Fields:**
- user_id: required | integer | exists:users,id
- password: required | string

Requires manage-pin-codes when removing another user's PIN.

item.name: Get Business Details With Branch Auth

request.description:
**Public.** Get business and branch by branch authorization code. Body: auth_code (required, string). Business is derived from the code; no business_id needed. Returns business + branch when code is valid and not expired.

**Fields:**
- auth_code: required | string

**Public.** Register a cashier device using a valid branch auth code.

**Fields:**
- auth_code: required | string
- device_id: required | string | max:50
- device_name: required | string | max:100
- device_type: optional | web | desktop | mobile | tablet
- os: optional | string | max:50
- app_version: optional | string | max:20

item.name: 2. Businesses
item.description: CRUD for businesses. Multi-tenant: each business has an owner and can have multiple branches. List returns only businesses the authenticated user belongs to. Create sets the creator as owner and creates a main branch. Use X-Business-Id header for get/update/delete.

request.description:
List all businesses the authenticated user belongs to. No business context required.

**Response:** Array of businesses with id, name, slug, branches, pivot (with branch_id).

Create a new business. Creator becomes owner and a main branch is auto-created.

**Fields:**
- name: required | string | max:255
- legal_name: nullable | string | max:255
- slug: nullable | string | max:255 | unique:businesses
- email: nullable | email | max:255
- phone: nullable | string | max:50
- address: nullable | string | max:500
- city: nullable | string | max:100
- state: nullable | string | max:100
- postal_code: nullable | string | max:20
- country: nullable | string | max:2
- currency: nullable | string | max:3
- time_zone: nullable | string | max:50
- tax_registration_number: nullable | string | max:100
- default_tax_rate: nullable | numeric | min:0 | max:100
- main_branch_name: nullable | string | max:255
- main_branch_code: nullable | string | max:50
- settings: nullable | array

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Acme Retail Ltd",
  "legal_name": "Acme Retail Limited",
  "slug": "acme-retail",
  "email": "contact@acme.com",
  "phone": "+1234567890",
  "address": "100 Commerce Street",
  "city": "New York",
  "state": "NY",
  "postal_code": "10001",
  "country": "US",
  "currency": "USD",
  "time_zone": "America/New_York",
  "tax_registration_number": "TAX123",
  "default_tax_rate": 10,
  "main_branch_name": "Head Office",
  "main_branch_code": "MAIN",
  "settings": {}
}

request.description:
Get one business by ID. Requires X-Business-Id header.

**Response:** Business object with branches.

Update business. Same fields as create (all optional).

**Fields:** All fields from Create Business are accepted, none are required.

Requires X-Business-Id.
Delete a business (soft delete). Requires X-Business-Id.

item.name: 2b. Dashboard
item.description: Business KPI summary (cached). Requires X-Business-Id and permissions for analytics, sales, inventory, or shifts.

request.description:
Returns organization-level summary: revenue, order counts, low/out stock, open shifts, etc.

X-Business-Id required.

item.name: 2c. Business settings (currency, deposit_stock_mode)
item.description: **Search: deposit, deposit_stock_mode, settings.** Endpoints: `GET/PUT settings/business`. `deposit_stock_mode` controls when stock moves for **deposit** sales (reserve_on_create vs deduct_on_complete). GET: any member. PUT: owner or **manage-settings**.

request.description:
Returns currency (ISO 3), currency_symbol, deposit_stock_mode (reserve_on_create | deduct_on_complete).

X-Business-Id required.

Update business-level settings.

**Fields:**
- currency: optional | string | size:3
- currency_symbol: optional | string | max:10
- deposit_stock_mode: optional | reserve_on_create | deduct_on_complete

X-Business-Id required.

item.name: 3. Permissions (Global)
item.description: Global list of all permissions in the system. Used when creating or editing roles. No business context required.

request.description: List all available permissions in the system. No business context. Used when building roles.
List branches for the business. Requires X-Business-Id. User sees only branches they have access to.

Generate 2-minute-expiry auth codes for all branches the user has permission to. No body. X-Business-Id required. Returns authorizations array (branch_id, branch_name, auth_code, expires_at). Existing non-expired codes are reused.

Create a branch within the business.

**Fields:**
- name: required | string | max:255
- code: required | string | max:50 | unique within business
- email: nullable | string | email | max:255
- phone: nullable | string | max:50
- address: nullable | string | max:500
- city: nullable | string | max:100
- state: nullable | string | max:100
- postal_code: nullable | string | max:20
- country: nullable | string | max:2
- time_zone: nullable | string | max:50
- tax_rate: nullable | numeric | min:0 | max:100
- settings: nullable | array
- is_main: optional | boolean
- is_active: optional | boolean

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Downtown Store",
  "code": "DT001",
  "email": "downtown@acme.com",
  "phone": "+1555123456",
  "address": "50 Main Ave",
  "city": "New York",
  "state": "NY",
  "postal_code": "10002",
  "country": "US",
  "time_zone": "America/New_York",
  "tax_rate": 10,
  "settings": {},
  "is_main": false,
  "is_active": true
}

request.description: Get one branch. X-Business-Id required.
Update branch. Same fields as create.
Delete a branch. X-Business-Id required.

item.name: 4b. Device groups (path: device-groups)
item.description: **Search: device-groups, group, terminal.** API path prefix is `device-groups` (not `groups`). Group POS **DeviceRegistration** rows for sales/shift reporting. Related: **4c. Devices**, and `POST shifts/backfill-groups` (14) to set `group_id` on old shifts. Permissions: view/manage device groups, assign device to group.

request.description: Query: branch_id, is_active, search. X-Business-Id required.
Aggregate completed sales by device group. Query: start_date, end_date, branch_id, group_id, device_id, shift_id.

Create a device group.

**Fields:**
- name: required | string
- code: required | string | unique per business
- branch_id: optional | integer
- description: optional | string
- is_active: optional | boolean

X-Business-Id required.
Returns group with active_shifts_count. X-Business-Id required.
Update group. Same fields as create (optional). X-Business-Id required.
Delete device group. X-Business-Id required.
Set a device registration's group. **Body:** device_id (string, max 50) — the client device_id, not DB id.
Remove device from this group (group_id cleared on device if it was in this group). **Body:** device_id (string).

item.name: 4c. Devices (registrations)
item.description: Registered sync devices for the business. Path {device} is the **DeviceRegistration** id (integer), not the string device_id.

request.description: Query: branch_id, status (active|inactive|blocked), search. X-Business-Id required.
Get one device registration with branch, user, group. X-Business-Id required.

Update device metadata and group/branch.

**Fields:**
- device_name, device_type: required on update (web|desktop|mobile|tablet)
- status: required (active|inactive|blocked)
- os, app_version, branch_id, group_id: optional
Same body as PUT.
Remove device registration from business. X-Business-Id required.

item.name: 4d. Sync Dashboard
item.description: Ops overview for offline sync (distinct from **Sync** device endpoints below). Requires **sync data** permission.

request.description: Counts: online devices, pending changes, unresolved conflicts, last sync. X-Business-Id required.
Paginated sync sessions. Query: status, direction, device_id (registration id), from, to, per_page (max 100).
Sessions where conflicts_detected > conflicts_resolved (limit 100). X-Business-Id required.

item.name: 5. Roles & Permissions
item.description: Business-scoped roles and permissions (Spatie). Create roles, attach/detach permissions, assign/remove roles to users. Role assignment can be branch-scoped (branch_id) or business-wide (branch_id null). X-Business-Id required.

request.description: List all roles for the business. X-Business-Id required.
Create a role. name required. permissions optional (array of permission names). business_id from X-Business-Id.
Attach permissions to a role. role_id (integer), permission_name (array of permission names) required.
Detach permissions from a role. role_id (integer), permission_name (array of permission names) required.
Get one role with permissions. Replace 1 with role id. X-Business-Id required.
Update role name. X-Business-Id required.
Delete a role. X-Business-Id required.
Assign a role to a user in this business. user_id, role_id required. branch_id optional for branch-scoped assignment.
Remove a role from a user. user_id, role_id required.
List all roles and permissions for a user in the business. X-Business-Id required.

List all users in the business with their roles. Permission: owner or manage-users. Query: branch_id (optional) – filter to users who have a role in this branch or a business-wide role; branch must belong to the business and requester must have branch access. Returns id, name, email, profile_image, profile_image_url, is_active, joined_at, roles. X-Business-Id required.

Add a user by email. If email does not exist, creates new user with random password; password returned in data.password. If user is assigned the Cashier role and has no PIN, a PIN is auto-generated and returned in data.pin_code. name required. Optional: profile_image (multipart) when creating new user. role_ids: optional array of role ids. Only owner can add.
Get one user's details in the business: roles, permissions. X-Business-Id required.
Update user's active status in the business. is_active required. Owner only.
Remove user from business and clear their roles. Owner only. Cannot remove self.

Set or clear password for a user in the business. Requires owner role.

**Fields:**
- password: nullable | string | min:8 | confirmed
- password_confirmation: required_with:password | string

item.name: 7. Product Categories
item.description: Product hierarchy. Categories can have parent_id for tree structure. Breadcrumb returns the parent chain for a category. X-Business-Id required.

request.description: List product categories. Query: per_page, search, parent_id. X-Business-Id required.
Create category. name required. parent_id optional for hierarchy. description, image, sort_order optional.
Get one category. X-Business-Id required.
Update category. Same fields as create.
Delete category. X-Business-Id required.
Get breadcrumb path for a category (parent chain). X-Business-Id required.

item.name: 7b. Data Seeding
item.description: Queue CSV/Excel import (products or product_categories). Returns 202 with id/uuid; poll GET seed/{id}/status for progress. Permission: create products. X-Business-Id required.

request.description:
**Multipart form-data.** Queues `ProcessSeedImport` job.

**Fields:**
- file: required | CSV or Excel (csv, xlsx, xls)
- entity: required | products | product_categories
- mapping: required | object or JSON string — file header → DB column (see config/seed.php allowed columns)
- unique_key: required | string — must be one of the mapping target columns
- branch_id: required | integer
- delete: optional | boolean — when true, rows are hard-deleted by unique_key instead of upserted

**Response (202):** message, id, uuid, status (pending). Use **Get Seed Import Status** with `id`.

**Products:** optional virtual columns `category` (by name), `retail_value` (requires `stock_quantity`; selling_price = retail_value / stock_quantity).

formdata.description: Example: map file column to DB column

request.description:
Poll import job status.

**Response:** id, uuid, status (pending|processing|completed|failed), entity, total_rows, created, updated, deleted, failed, errors, started_at, completed_at.

X-Business-Id or business_id query recommended.

List products.

**Query:**
- branch_id: optional | integer
- category_id: optional | integer
- search: optional | string (name, sku, barcode)
- per_page: optional | integer (default 15)
- is_active: optional | boolean

X-Business-Id required.
Create product. name, sku, base_selling_price required. stock_tracking: none|simple|variant. low_stock_threshold integer. meta_data object.

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Wireless Mouse",
  "sku": "SKU-MOUSE-001",
  "barcode": "1234567890123",
  "category_id": 1,
  "description": "Ergonomic wireless mouse",
  "image": null,
  "base_cost_price": 15.99,
  "base_selling_price": 29.99,
  "is_taxable": true,
  "default_tax_rate": 10,
  "unit_of_measure": "piece",
  "weight": 0.1,
  "weight_unit": "kg",
  "stock_tracking": "simple",
  "low_stock_threshold": 10,
  "is_active": true,
  "is_available_online": false,
  "meta_data": {}
}

request.description: Get product. Optional query: branch_id for branch-specific pricing/stock. X-Business-Id required.
Update product. Same fields as create (all optional).
Delete product. X-Business-Id required.

Add or update product at a branch. branch_id required. Optional: cost_price, selling_price, compare_price, discount_amount, discount_type (fixed|percentage), tax_rate, stock_quantity, low_stock_threshold, allow_backorder, reorder_point, reorder_quantity, is_available, is_featured, display_order, bin_location, shelf_location, branch_meta_data. Permission: manage branch products.

body.raw:
{
  "branch_id": 1,
  "selling_price": 29.99,
  "compare_price": 39.99,
  "cost_price": 15.99,
  "stock_quantity": 100,
  "discount_amount": 0,
  "discount_type": "fixed",
  "tax_rate": 10,
  "low_stock_threshold": 10,
  "allow_backorder": false,
  "is_available": true,
  "is_featured": false,
  "display_order": 0,
  "bin_location": null,
  "shelf_location": null,
  "branch_meta_data": null
}

request.description: Remove product from branch (soft delete). branch_id and current_business_id required as query params. Permission: manage branch products.

Update the base selling price for a product.

**Fields:**
- selling_price: required | numeric | min:0

**Query:**
- branch_id: optional | integer

X-Business-Id required.

**Deprecated.** Legacy endpoint for updating product price. Use `PATCH products/{id}/base-selling-price` instead.

**Fields:**
- selling_price: required | numeric | min:0
- branch_id: optional | integer

X-Business-Id required.
List unit definitions for a product (e.g. piece, pack of 6, carton). Used for tiered pricing. X-Business-Id required.
Create a unit definition for a product. Body: name (e.g. \"Pack of 6\"), quantity_multiplier (>=1), optional min_quantity and display_order.
Update a unit definition. Same fields as create (all optional).
Delete a unit definition. Only allowed when not used in active pricing.

Get products for a branch with branch_data. Query: current_business_id (or X-Business-Id), category_id, active_only, available_only, in_stock_only, search, start_id, per_page (default 15), paginated (default true). Permission: view products.

item.name: 9. Branch Products
item.description: Product–branch association: pricing, shelf/store quantities, availability. Move to shelf/store: direct move (requires approve shelf store move or manage/adjust inventory) or use Shelf/Store Move Requests for approval workflow. Stock summary, bulk update. X-Business-Id required.

request.description: List products in a branch. Query: branch_id (required), is_available, is_featured, stock_status, search, per_page. X-Business-Id required.
Get branch products grouped by category. Query: branch_id required. X-Business-Id required.

Add product to branch. branch_id, product_id required. selling_price is set from product base_selling_price; use PATCH selling-price to change. shelf_quantity, store_quantity, cost_price, compare_price, low_stock_threshold, etc.
Add multiple products to a branch at once. branch_id, product_ids array. Uses product defaults for pricing/stock.

Bulk move stock between shelf and store within one branch. Requires same permissions as direct move-to-shelf/store (approve shelf store move or manage/adjust inventory).

**Fields:**
- branch_id: required
- direction: required | to_shelf | to_store
- mode: required | all | fixed_quantity | per_item
- For mode=fixed_quantity: branch_product_ids (array), quantity (integer)
- For mode=per_item: items: [{ branch_product_id, quantity }]

X-Business-Id required.

Update selling_price for multiple branch products in one branch. Same permission as PATCH branch-products/{id}/selling-price: business owner or **set branch product selling price**.

**Fields:**
- branch_id: required | integer | exists:branches
- items: required | array | min:1
- items.*.branch_product_id: required | integer (must belong to branch_id)
- items.*.selling_price: required | numeric | min:0

**Response:** message, summary (processed, updated, skipped), results[] with previous_selling_price and selling_price per row.

X-Business-Id required.
Get one branch product. Replace 1 with branch_product id. X-Business-Id required.
Compute effective unit price and total for a quantity using unit packs and quantity tiers. Query: quantity (required). X-Business-Id required.
List unit-specific prices for this branch product (e.g. pack of 6, carton). X-Business-Id required.
Create a unit price for this branch product. Body: product_unit_id, selling_price.
Update a unit price. Body: selling_price.
Delete unit price for this branch product.
List quantity-based price tiers (e.g. 1–5 = 500, 6–19 = 450, 20+ = 400). X-Business-Id required.
Create quantity-based price tier. Body: min_quantity, optional max_quantity, price_per_unit.
Update quantity-based price tier.
Delete quantity-based price tier.
Update branch product. Do not send selling_price (use PATCH selling-price). cost_price, compare_price, shelf_quantity, store_quantity, is_available, etc.
Set selling price for branch product. Requires 'set branch product selling price' permission. selling_price required.
Remove product from branch. X-Business-Id required.
Adjust stock. quantity (integer), operation: add|subtract|set. X-Business-Id required.
Direct move (store to shelf). Requires approve shelf store move or manage/adjust inventory. Otherwise use shelf-store-move-requests. quantity required.
Direct move (shelf to store). Requires approve shelf store move or manage/adjust inventory. Otherwise use shelf-store-move-requests. quantity required.
Stock summary. Query: branch_id. X-Business-Id required.
Bulk update. updates: array of { id: branch_product_id, data: { ...fields } }. X-Business-Id required.

item.name: 9b. Suppliers, GRN & Purchase orders
item.description: Procurement: suppliers, goods received notes (GRN), purchase orders (PO). X-Business-Id required.

request.description: List suppliers. Query: q, is_active. X-Business-Id required.
Create supplier. name required. X-Business-Id required.
Get supplier. X-Business-Id required.
Update supplier. X-Business-Id required.
Delete supplier. X-Business-Id required.
List supplier product prices. X-Business-Id required.
Posted GRNs grouped by supplier. Query: days (default 30). X-Business-Id required.
List goods received notes. Query: branch_id, status. X-Business-Id required.
Create draft GRN. branch_id and supplier_id required. X-Business-Id required.
Get one GRN. X-Business-Id required.
Update GRN header fields. X-Business-Id required.
Delete GRN when allowed. X-Business-Id required.
Submit GRN for approval. X-Business-Id required.
Approve and post GRN. X-Business-Id required.
Reject GRN. Body: reason. X-Business-Id required.
Cancel GRN. X-Business-Id required.
Add GRN line. X-Business-Id required.
Update GRN line. X-Business-Id required.
Delete GRN line. X-Business-Id required.
List purchase orders. Query: branch_id, status, supplier_id. X-Business-Id required.
Top variance items. Query: limit. X-Business-Id required.
Create PO. branch_id, supplier_id and lines[] required. X-Business-Id required.
Get purchase order. X-Business-Id required.
Update draft purchase order header. X-Business-Id required.
Submit PO. X-Business-Id required.
Cancel PO. X-Business-Id required.
Receivable breakdown. X-Business-Id required.

List inventory transactions.

**Query:**
- branch_id: optional | integer
- product_id: optional | integer
- type: optional | in:purchase,sale,adjustment,transfer_out,transfer_in,return,damage,initial
- start_date: optional | date
- end_date: optional | date
- reference_number: optional | string
- per_page: optional | integer

X-Business-Id required.

Create an inventory transaction.

**Fields:**
- branch_id: required | integer | exists:branches
- product_id: required | integer | exists:products
- type: required | in:purchase,sale,adjustment,transfer_out,transfer_in,return,damage,initial
- quantity: required | numeric | not:0 (positive=in, negative=out)
- shelf_quantity: nullable | numeric
- store_quantity: nullable | numeric
- location: optional | in:shelf,store,both (default: both)
- unit_cost: nullable | numeric | min:0
- reference_number: nullable | string | max:255
- related_branch_id: nullable | integer | exists:branches (for transfers)
- notes: nullable | string
- meta_data: nullable | array
- batch_number: nullable | string | max:100
- lot_number: nullable | string | max:100
- manufacturing_date: nullable | date
- expiry_date: nullable | date
- supplier_id: nullable | integer | exists:suppliers,id
- supplier_name: nullable | string | max:255 (legacy fallback)
- supplier_reference: nullable | string | max:255

Server allocates batches (FEFO) for batch-tracked products.

body.raw:
{
  "branch_id": 1,
  "product_id": 1,
  "type": "adjustment",
  "quantity": 25,
  "shelf_quantity": null,
  "store_quantity": null,
  "location": "both",
  "unit_cost": 10.50,
  "reference_number": "ADJ-001",
  "related_branch_id": null,
  "notes": "Stock count correction",
  "meta_data": {},
  "batch_number": null,
  "lot_number": null,
  "manufacturing_date": null,
  "expiry_date": null,
  "supplier_id": null,
  "supplier_name": null,
  "supplier_reference": null
}

request.description: Get one transaction. X-Business-Id required.
Stock summary. Query: branch_id. X-Business-Id required.

item.name: 11. Customers
item.description: CRUD for customers. Types: walk-in, regular, vip. credit_limit, metadata. Filter by type, is_active, search. X-Business-Id required.

request.description: List customers. Query: type (walk-in|regular|vip), is_active, search, per_page. X-Business-Id or current_business_id.

Create customer.

**Fields:**
- name: required | string | max:255
- email: nullable | email | max:255
- phone: nullable | string | max:50
- address: nullable | string | max:500
- type: optional | in:walk-in,regular,vip (default: walk-in)
- credit_limit: nullable | numeric | min:0
- is_active: optional | boolean
- metadata: nullable | array
Get one customer. X-Business-Id required.
Update customer. Same fields as create.
Delete customer. X-Business-Id required.
List payment methods. Query: is_active. X-Business-Id required.

Create payment method.

**Fields:**
- name: required | string | max:255
- type: required | in:cash,card,mobile_money,bank_transfer,cheque,other
- description: nullable | string | max:500
- account_details: nullable | array
- is_active: optional | boolean
- sort_order: optional | integer
Get one payment method. X-Business-Id required.
Update payment method. Same fields as create.
Delete payment method. X-Business-Id required.

item.name: 13. Sales
item.description: **Search: sales, deposit, by-reference, complete-deposit.** Sales (POS). Open a **deposit** with **Create Sale** using `sale_type: "deposit"`. Deposit **stock policy** is in **2c. Business settings** (`deposit_stock_mode`). Subfolder **Deposits** has lookup + complete-only requests. Unit price: tiered pricing or override permission. Shift must be open for new sales. X-Business-Id required.

item.name: Deposits (search: deposit, complete-deposit)
item.description:
**Search: deposit, complete-deposit, by-reference, recall.**

- **Create** a deposit sale: use **Create Sale** in this folder with `sale_type: "deposit"` (and other required fields).
- **When stock moves** (on create vs on complete): **2c. Business settings** → `GET/PUT settings/business` → `deposit_stock_mode`.
- **Lookup** a sale: `GET /sales/by-reference/{reference}` (matches `sale_number` or `reference_id`).
- **Complete** a pending deposit: `POST /sales/{id}/complete-deposit`.

X-Business-Id required for all.

request.description:
Look up a sale by **sale_number** or **reference_id** (path segment = `{{sale_reference}}`). Common for **recalling a deposit** at the till.

X-Business-Id required.

Complete a **deposit** sale (`sale_type: deposit`, status **pending**). Optional final **payments**; if you send payments, you need an **open shift** on the sale’s branch.

**Fields:**
- payments: optional | array of { payment_method_id, amount, reference_number?, notes? }
- closing_notes: optional | string

X-Business-Id required.

List sales.

**Query:**
- branch_id: optional | integer
- start_date: optional | date (Y-m-d)
- end_date: optional | date (Y-m-d)
- status: optional | in:completed,voided
- customer_id: optional | integer
- per_page: optional | integer

X-Business-Id required.

Create a new sale. Shift must be open.

**Fields:**
- branch_id: required | integer | exists:branches
- customer_id: nullable | integer | exists:customers
- shift_id: nullable | integer | exists:sales_shifts
- sale_type: optional | in:pos,online,delivery,wholesale,**deposit** (use **deposit** for layaway / deposit flow)
- discount_amount: optional | numeric | min:0
- notes: nullable | string
- items: required | array | min:1
  - items.*.product_id: required | integer | exists:products
  - items.*.quantity: required | numeric | min:0.01
  - items.*.unit_price: optional | numeric | min:0 (auto-computed from tiered pricing unless overridden; override requires 'override sale price' permission)
  - items.*.discount_percentage: optional | numeric | min:0 | max:100
  - items.*.tax_rate: optional | numeric | min:0
  - items.*.batch_id: nullable | integer
- payments: optional | array
  - payments.*.payment_method_id: required | integer | exists:payment_methods
  - payments.*.amount: required | numeric | min:0.01
  - payments.*.reference_number: nullable | string | max:255
Get one sale with items and payments. X-Business-Id required.
Add a payment to a sale. payment_method_id, amount required. reference_number, notes optional.
Cancel/void a sale. X-Business-Id required.

List shifts.

**Query:**
- status: optional | in:open,paused,closed
- branch_id: optional | integer
- user_id: optional | integer
- filter: optional | in:today,last_7_days
- start_date: optional | date
- end_date: optional | date
- has_discrepancy: optional | boolean
- per_page: optional | integer

X-Business-Id required.
Start a new shift. branch_id, opening_balance required. opening_notes optional. User can have only one active (open or paused) shift.
Get current open or paused shift for the authenticated user. X-Business-Id required.
Get one shift with stats and sales details. X-Business-Id required.
List sales for a shift. Query: status (active|voided), payment_method. X-Business-Id required.
Close shift. actual_cash, pin_code required. closing_notes optional. User must have PIN set; PIN verified. Can close from open or paused.
Pause an open shift. No sales allowed while paused. No body required.
Resume a paused shift. pin_code required (6 digits). User must have PIN set.
Mark shift variance as resolved. resolution_notes required. Shift must be closed with variance.

Summary of shifts for a branch.

**Query:**
- branch_id: required | integer | exists:branches
- start_date: optional | date
- end_date: optional | date | after_or_equal:start_date
- user_id: optional | integer | exists:users

X-Business-Id required.

Admin/maintenance: set **SalesShift.group_id** from the **device**'s **DeviceGroup** when the shift was missing `group_id`. **Not** the CRUD under `device-groups`—this only backfills old shift rows. No body. Requires owner, **view all shifts**, or **create shift**.

**Response:** scanned, updated, skipped counts.

X-Business-Id required.
Get summary for a specific shift (totals, payment breakdown, etc.). X-Business-Id required.

item.name: 15. Batches
item.description: Product batches (FEFO, expiry). List with filters: branch_id, product_id, status, near_expiry (days), expired. Responses include quick_sale_requested. Update status (active|depleted|expired|recalled). X-Business-Id required.

request.description: List batches. Each item includes product, branch, quick_sale_requested_count, quick_sale_requested. Query: branch_id, product_id, status (active|depleted|expired|recalled), expired (true), near_expiry (days), batch_number, lot_number, sort_by (default expiry_date), sort_direction, per_page. X-Business-Id required.
Batches nearing expiry. Response: batches (with product, branch, quick_sale_requested), count, days_threshold. Query: days (default 30), branch_id. X-Business-Id required.
List expired batches with current_quantity > 0. Response: batches (slim product/branch), count, total_value. Query: branch_id. X-Business-Id required.
Get one batch with product, branch, inventory transaction, quick_sale_requested. X-Business-Id required.
Update batch. Body: status (active|depleted|expired|recalled), lot_number, supplier_name, supplier_reference, notes. X-Business-Id required.
List batches for a product (FEFO order). Response: batches array with branch, expiry, quantities, quick_sale_requested. X-Business-Id required.

Organization-wide analytics.

**Query:**
- start_date: optional | date
- end_date: optional | date | after_or_equal:start_date
- compare_previous: optional | boolean

X-Business-Id required.

Analytics by branch.

**Query:**
- start_date: optional | date
- end_date: optional | date | after_or_equal:start_date
- branch_id: optional | integer (all branches if omitted)

X-Business-Id required.

Product performance analytics.

**Query:**
- start_date: optional | date
- end_date: optional | date | after_or_equal:start_date
- branch_id: optional | integer
- limit: optional | integer (default 10)
- sort_by: optional | in:quantity,revenue,profit
- direction: optional | in:asc,desc

X-Business-Id required.

Profit & loss report.

**Query:**
- start_date: optional | date
- end_date: optional | date | after_or_equal:start_date
- branch_id: optional | integer

X-Business-Id required.

Growth trend analysis over time.

**Query:**
- start_date: optional | date
- end_date: optional | date | after_or_equal:start_date
- period: optional | in:day,week,month (default: day)
- branch_id: optional | integer

X-Business-Id required.

item.name: 17. Stock Transfer Requests
item.description: Move stock between branches. Create request (branch_from_id, branch_to_id, branch_product_id, quantity). Approve at sending branch; accept/reject at receiving branch; confirm receipt. Cancel from sending branch. X-Business-Id required.

request.description: List transfer requests. Query: status, branch_id, per_page. X-Business-Id required.

Create a single-item transfer request. branch_from_id, branch_to_id, branch_product_id (branch_product at source branch), quantity_requested required. reason, priority (low|normal|high|urgent) optional.
Get one request. X-Business-Id required.
Approve out-request at sending branch. Creates transfer-in request for receiving branch. Optional body: notes. X-Business-Id required.
Accept transfer at receiving branch (in-request). Confirms receipt. X-Business-Id required.
Reject at receiving branch. reason required (max 500). Reverses stock at sending branch. X-Business-Id required.
Reject out-request at sending branch. reason required (max 500). X-Business-Id required.
Confirm receipt at destination (in-request). actual_quantity (optional, default=requested), notes optional. X-Business-Id required.
Cancel a request. reason required (max 500). X-Business-Id required.

item.name: 17b. Shelf/Store Move Requests
item.description: Request-based workflow for moving stock between shelf and store within a branch. Create request (branch_product_id, direction: to_shelf|to_store, quantity). Approvers approve or reject; on approve the move is performed. Permissions: request shelf store move, approve shelf store move. Direct move via branch-products move-to-shelf/store requires approve permission. X-Business-Id required.

request.description: List move requests. Query: branch_id, status, my_requests, pending_approval, per_page. X-Business-Id required.
Request to move stock. branch_product_id, direction (to_shelf|to_store), quantity required. reason optional. Requires request shelf store move.
Get one request. X-Business-Id required.
Approve and perform the move. Requires approve shelf store move.
Reject the request. reason optional (max 500).
List write-offs. Query: branch_id, product_id, start_date, end_date. X-Business-Id required.

Create write-off. Pass product_id + branch_id, or branch_product_id. quantity, source (shelf|store), reason required. reason max 1000 chars. Deducts from batches (FEFO) when product uses batch tracking.
Get one write-off. X-Business-Id required.

Write off all remaining quantity from a batch.

**Fields:**
- batch_id: required | integer | exists:product_batches,id
- reason: required | string | max:1000
- current_business_id: required | integer | exists:businesses,id

X-Business-Id required.

item.name: 19. Refund Requests
item.description: Refund workflow. Create request: refund_scope whole_sale (default) or items. For items, send items array with sale_item_id and quantity (partial refund). Approve restores inventory and updates sale refunded_amount; reject with reason. One pending request per sale. X-Business-Id required.

request.description: List refund requests. Query: status, branch_id. X-Business-Id required.
Create refund request. sale_id, reason required. refund_scope: whole_sale (default) or items. For items, pass items: [{ sale_item_id, quantity }].
Partial refund: pass refund_scope: items and items array.
Get one request. X-Business-Id required.
Approve refund. Requires approver permission. X-Business-Id required.

Reject refund request.

**Fields:**
- rejection_reason: required | string | max:500

X-Business-Id required.

item.name: 20. Quick Sales
item.description: Near-expiry or promotional quick-sale requests. Create with branch_product_id (or batch), discount_percentage, start_date, end_date. Approve/reject/end. When approved and active, discount applies to branch product. X-Business-Id required.

request.description:
List quick sale (near-expiry discount) requests.

**Query:**
- status: optional (pending|approved|rejected|ended)
- branch_id: optional (integer)

X-Business-Id required.

Request quick sale for a near-expiry product.

**Fields:**
- product_id: required | integer | exists:products
- branch_id: required | integer | exists:branches
- batch_id: nullable | integer | exists:product_batches
- reason: required | string | min:10 | max:1000
- expiry_date: required | date | after:today
- discount_type: optional | percentage | fixed
- discount_value: optional | numeric | min:0
- start_time: optional | date | after_or_equal:now
- end_time: optional | date | after:start_time (when start_time present)

**Auto-approve:** If the user has **approve quick sale** (or is business owner) and sends **all four** optional discount/period fields, the quick sale is created and approved in one step (same rules as Approve endpoint). If `start_time` is now or past, status becomes **active** and discount applies to the branch product.

X-Business-Id required.
Get one quick sale with product, branch, batch details. X-Business-Id required.

Approve quick sale and set discount details.

**Fields:**
- discount_type: required | in:percentage,fixed
- discount_value: required | numeric | min:0
- start_time: required | date
- end_time: required | date | after:start_time

X-Business-Id required.

Reject quick sale.

**Fields:**
- rejection_reason: required | string | max:500

X-Business-Id required.
End active quick sale early. No body needed. X-Business-Id required.

item.name: 21. Sync (Offline / Device)
item.description: Offline-first device sync. Register device; bootstrap (initial data); pull (changes since timestamp); push (local sales, customers, etc.); resolve conflicts; status; heartbeat. Use X-Business-Id and X-Device-Id.

request.description: Register device for sync. device_id, device_name, device_type (web|desktop|mobile|tablet) required. branch_id, business_id, os, app_version, capabilities optional. X-Business-Id for context.
Initial data pull for device. session_id, device_id. Returns products, categories, branches, etc. X-Business-Id, X-Device-Id required.
Pull changes since last sync. session_id, device_id, since_timestamp optional. X-Business-Id, X-Device-Id required.
Push local changes. session_id, changes: { sales: [], customers: [], ... }. Each record: client_uuid, ... fields. X-Business-Id, X-Device-Id required.
Submit conflict resolutions. session_id, resolutions. X-Business-Id, X-Device-Id required.
Get sync status for device. X-Business-Id, X-Device-Id required.
Keep sync session alive. device_id. X-Business-Id, X-Device-Id required.

List devices currently online (heartbeat within threshold).

**Query:**
- branch_id: optional | integer

X-Business-Id required.

item.name: 22. Server Sync (Edge ↔ Cloud)
item.description: Server-to-server sync between edge and cloud. Push/pull from edge; receive/provide-changes on cloud. Status and health endpoints. X-Business-Id required.

request.description:
Edge server pushes local changes to cloud.

**Fields:**
- session_id: required | string
- server_id: required | string
- changes: required | array (keyed by entity type)
- last_sync_at: nullable | date

X-Business-Id required.

Edge server pulls changes from cloud.

**Fields:**
- session_id: required | string
- server_id: required | string
- last_sync_at: nullable | date
- entities: nullable | array

X-Business-Id required.

Get server-sync status (last sync time, pending changes, etc.).

X-Business-Id required.

Health check for server-sync connectivity.

X-Business-Id required.

Cloud receives data pushed from edge.

**Fields:**
- session_id: required | string
- server_id: required | string
- changes: required | array
- last_sync_at: nullable | date

X-Business-Id required.

Cloud provides changes to edge.

**Fields:**
- session_id: required | string
- server_id: required | string
- last_sync_at: nullable | date
- entities: nullable | array

X-Business-Id required.

item.name: Sample Error Responses
item.description: Reference examples for common error responses returned by the API.

request.description: Example of an unauthenticated request (no or invalid Bearer token).
Example of a validation error response.

response.name: 422 Validation Error

request.description: Example of a forbidden action (insufficient permissions).

response.name: 403 Forbidden

request.description: Example of a not-found response.
